detailed_description: The video features a woman in a white blazer and hijab delivering a presentation at the '25th World Congress of Dermatology' in Singapore 2023. She stands behind a branded podium, actively speaking and conveying key information to an audience, likely about medical efficacy and recurrence prevention using various agents. A large screen behind her displays presentation slides with text and a cityscape graphic. The segment effectively showcases a professional delivering specialized expertise in a formal conference setting.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is kept as the Semantic Core because it fully captures the 'Key Information' being delivered by the speaker. The visual of the speaker at the branded podium, coupled with her active presentation, is the core action and expertise demonstration in this conference setting. There are no setup, calibration, or post-action dead air moments, adhering to the 'No-Mistake Rule'.
